rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"When verifying risk gate behavior, the task title/label describes the verification goal, not the implementation task itself — keep scope narrow.","scope":"kody pipeline"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"This codebase has two auth systems coexisting: legacy session-based auth in src/auth/ and a newer auth system. Any migration must target the legacy system specifically.","scope":"src/auth"},{"kind":"convention","text":"The build stage handles both clarifying questions for the plan AND the implementation. ExitPlanMode is called before proceeding to build.","scope":"kody pipeline"}]}
